craft_observations.pov_distance: Close third person with selective interior access; reader is permitted into Xu Yu's calculations but not others' until their dialogue reveals it
craft_observations.sentence_rhythm: Alternates between extended explanatory passages and sharp dialogue exchanges; emotional beats use shorter declarative sentences
craft_observations.paragraphing: Long paragraphs for exposition and interior thought; dialogue-heavy scenes use short paragraph breaks to create pacing tension
craft_observations.dialogue_method: Primarily direct confrontation dialogue with occasional reported speech for past events; character voices distinguished through verbal habits (Xu Yu's formal restraint vs Qin Wuyan's sardonic confidence)
craft_observations.description_method: Scenic description used sparingly; when present, it functions symbolically (setting sun, darkening sea) rather than atmospherically
craft_observations.exposition_method: Layered revelation through competing character knowledge—one character explains what another already knows but the reader does not
craft_observations.hook_delivery: Chapter ends on an unexpected development that reframes the entire situation rather than cliffhanger tension
craft_observations.transition_method: Time skips handled through arrival at new location; scene transitions marked by character movement (entering cabin, stepping off ship)
